series.description: A series exploring how we design AI that is not just powerful, but safe, interpretable, and aligned with human values — from uncertainty quantification to real-world deployment.

series.description: Lessons from taking AI research out of the lab and into the real world — the messy, exhilarating, and often humbling journey of building a company around a technical idea.

series.title: AI Meets the Clinic
series.description: How AI is reshaping healthcare operations, from the front desk to diagnosis — and why getting it right requires as much empathy as engineering.
